channel.title: PURSUE UFO Tracker
channel.description: The independent tracker for the Trump administration's PURSUE UAP disclosure program. Every file from every drop, indexed, scored on the Anomalousness Index, and verified against war.gov. Rolling release.

item.title: FBI Composite Sketch - Ellipsoid Bronze Object
item.description: FBI composite drawing of a bronze metallic ellipsoid object reported at 130-195 feet in length. Witness-derived; no sensor corroboration in the released packet.

item.title: State Department Cables 1985-2025 - Six Diplomatic Posts
item.description: State Department cable traffic from six embassies/consulates (Papua New Guinea, Kazakhstan, Turkmenistan, Georgia, Mexico, Tajikistan) reporting UAP encounters across four decades.

item.title: Tajikistan 1994 - PanAm Crew at FL410
item.description: State Department cable documenting a PanAm commercial crew witnessing a high-altitude maneuvering object at 41,000 feet. Trained-aviator multi-witness sighting.

item.title: Western US - Eye of Sauron Orb Encounter
item.description: Federal agents reporting an Eye-of-Sauron-styled orb, plus orange orbs reportedly emitting smaller red orbs. Multi-witness federal personnel observation with imagery.

item.title: Syria 2024 - Twin Orange Translucent Areas
item.description: Two semi-transparent orange luminous areas observed over the Syrian theater. Plausible atmospheric or pyrotechnic explanations exist but were not formally adjudicated.

item.title: Indo-Pacific 2024 - Football-Shaped Object
item.description: Football-shaped object captured in Indo-Pacific airspace. Sensor data preserved; no conventional aircraft signature attached in the released file.

item.title: Greece 2023 - 90 Degree Turn at 80 mph
item.description: Object executing a 90 degree turn at approximately 80 mph - a maneuver inconsistent with known fixed-wing or rotary aircraft inertial limits.

item.title: Mediterranean Triangular UAP at 25,000 ft
item.description: Triangular metallic object recorded at 25,000 feet over the Mediterranean. Sensor capture; flight characteristics not matched to known platforms.

item.title: Roswell, NM 1947 - Hexagonal Object
item.description: FBI Dallas field office memo to headquarters describing a recovered hexagonal object suspended from a balloon-like structure. Long the subject of public speculation; now in the official record.

item.title: FBI Case File 62-HQ-83894 (1947-1968)
item.description: FBI headquarters master file aggregating 18 separate UAP-related incidents across two decades, including Roswell-era field office reporting.

item.title: Schmitt Lunar Flash - Grimaldi Crater
item.description: Astronaut Harrison Schmitt report of a lunar surface flash near Grimaldi crater. Possible meteoroid impact - candidate explanation exists but never formally closed.

item.title: Apollo 17 - Triangular Formation
item.description: Frame depicting three dots in a triangular formation in the lunar sky. No atmospheric or stellar explanation has been advanced in the released file.

item.title: Apollo 12 Lunar Surface Anomalies
item.description: Photographic frames from Apollo 12 showing unexplained reflective objects and lighting on the lunar surface. Reviewed by NASA but not resolved to a conventional source.
